message:
test(assign): add 17 coverage tests for effectiveness scoring and ranking (bd-2xdjb)

Cover GetEffectivenessScore cache hit/miss/stale/nil paths (50%→100%),
GetEffectivenessBonus with scored data across all modes (55.6%→100%),
and RankAgentsForTask with effectiveness-driven reordering, partial data,
and confidence scaling (70.8%→100%). Package coverage: 83.9%→88.6%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
